description_fr: Game of Thrones, Breaking Bad, Friends, Stranger Things. Les séries cultes en questions.
description_en: Game of Thrones, Breaking Bad, Friends, Stranger Things. Cult TV series in questions.

questions.question_fr: Quel est le nom du personnage principal de Breaking Bad ?
questions.question_en: What is the name of the main character in Breaking Bad?
questions.explanation_fr: Walter White (Bryan Cranston) est le prof de chimie qui devient narcotrafiquant.
questions.explanation_en: Walter White (Bryan Cranston) is the chemistry teacher turned drug lord.

questions.question_fr: Dans quelle ville se déroule Friends ?
questions.question_en: In which city is Friends set?
questions.explanation_fr: Friends se déroule à New York, principalement à Manhattan.
questions.explanation_en: Friends is set in New York, mainly in Manhattan.

questions.question_fr: Game of Thrones est basée sur les livres de George R.R. Martin.
questions.question_en: Game of Thrones is based on George R.R. Martin's books.
questions.explanation_fr: Adaptée de la saga 'A Song of Ice and Fire' commencée en 1996.
questions.explanation_en: Adapted from 'A Song of Ice and Fire' saga started in 1996.

questions.question_fr: Quel est le surnom de la maison Stark dans Game of Thrones ?
questions.question_en: What is the motto of House Stark in Game of Thrones?
questions.explanation_fr: 'Winter Is Coming' (L'hiver vient) est la devise des Stark de Winterfell.
questions.explanation_en: 'Winter Is Coming' is the motto of House Stark of Winterfell.

questions.question_fr: Dans quelle ville se déroule Stranger Things ?
questions.question_en: In which fictional town is Stranger Things set?
questions.explanation_fr: Hawkins, Indiana, est la ville fictive où se déroule la série.
questions.explanation_en: Hawkins, Indiana, is the fictional town where the series takes place.

questions.question_fr: Dans Lost, l'avion de la compagnie Oceanic Airlines portait le numéro ___.
questions.question_en: In Lost, the Oceanic Airlines plane was flight number ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Le vol Oceanic 815 reliait Sydney à Los Angeles avant de s'écraser.
questions.explanation_en: Oceanic Flight 815 was flying Sydney to Los Angeles before crashing.

questions.question_fr: Quel est le métier de Sheldon dans The Big Bang Theory ?
questions.question_en: What is Sheldon's profession in The Big Bang Theory?
questions.explanation_fr: Sheldon Cooper est physicien théorique au Caltech.
questions.explanation_en: Sheldon Cooper is a theoretical physicist at Caltech.

questions.question_fr: La Casa de Papel est une série espagnole.
questions.question_en: Money Heist is a Spanish series.
questions.explanation_fr: La Casa de Papel (Money Heist) est une série espagnole créée par Álex Pina, sortie en 2017.
questions.explanation_en: Money Heist (La Casa de Papel) is a Spanish series created by Álex Pina, released in 2017.

questions.question_fr: Quelle série suit l'agence publicitaire Sterling Cooper dans les années 60 ?
questions.question_en: Which series follows the Sterling Cooper ad agency in the 60s?
questions.explanation_fr: Mad Men (2007-2015) suit Don Draper et l'agence Sterling Cooper à Manhattan.
questions.explanation_en: Mad Men (2007-2015) follows Don Draper and the Sterling Cooper agency in Manhattan.

questions.question_fr: Quel personnage de The Office est interprété par Steve Carell ?
questions.question_en: Which character in The Office is played by Steve Carell?
questions.explanation_fr: Michael Scott est le directeur régional de Dunder Mifflin Scranton.
questions.explanation_en: Michael Scott is the regional manager of Dunder Mifflin Scranton.

questions.question_fr: Dans Peaky Blinders, la famille principale s'appelle ___.
questions.question_en: In Peaky Blinders, the main family is named ___.
questions.explanation_fr: La famille Shelby est dirigée par Tommy Shelby (Cillian Murphy) à Birmingham.
questions.explanation_en: The Shelby family is led by Tommy Shelby (Cillian Murphy) in Birmingham.

questions.question_fr: Squid Game est une série coréenne.
questions.question_en: Squid Game is a Korean series.
questions.explanation_fr: Squid Game (오징어 게임) est sortie sur Netflix en septembre 2021.
questions.explanation_en: Squid Game (오징어 게임) was released on Netflix in September 2021.

questions.question_en: How many seasons does Friends have?

questions.question_fr: Quel est le nom du dragon de Daenerys dans Game of Thrones (le plus grand) ?
questions.question_en: What is the name of Daenerys's largest dragon in Game of Thrones?
questions.explanation_fr: Drogon, nommé en l'honneur de Khal Drogo, est le plus grand des trois dragons.
questions.explanation_en: Drogon, named after Khal Drogo, is the largest of the three dragons.

questions.question_fr: Dans Breaking Bad, le pseudonyme de Walter White est ___.
questions.question_en: In Breaking Bad, Walter White's alias is ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Walter White prend le pseudonyme Heisenberg, du physicien allemand.
questions.explanation_en: Walter White takes the alias Heisenberg, after the German physicist.
